data.narrative:
Allen Control Systems is a Series B-stage defense and security company founded by Mike Wior, Steve Simoni, and Luke Allen, having raised $200M to date. Valuation analysis draws on a comparable universe of 10 peers: 2 public entities (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private companies operating in Defense & Security at equivalent stages.

Two triangulation methods were applied. Stage-progression analysis uses the $200M total raised as a valuation proxy, applying a 1.9x step-up multiplier typical for Series B advancement, yielding $380M. Peer-median analysis examines 7 same-sector, same-stage comparables including Dream Security ($3.0B), Harmattan AI ($1.4B), Code Metal ($1.2B), Castelion ($1.0B), and Defense Unicorns ($1.0B). The peer cohort spans $300M to $3.0B, with a median valuation of $1.0B.

The triangulated analysis supports a valuation range of $323M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $690M. This wide distribution—spanning 3.6x from low to high—reflects material dispersion in Defense & Security Series B valuations. The gap between stage-progression ($380M) and peer-median ($1.0B) suggests uncertainty around whether Allen Control's capital efficiency and market position align with higher-valued peers or warrant a more conservative multiple. Resolution hinges on defensibility of technology, customer concentration, and revenue growth trajectory relative to the peer set.
